summary: Frontend testing of Paint Shop Paint Shop upgrade. CRITICAL BUG: Color bleed persists on truck_04 (Compact Transit Van) - entire canvas background gets colored instead of just the truck body. All other 5 truck models work correctly. Color Wheel, palettes, finishes, two-tone, text, extras, save, and reset all function properly.

ui_bugs.issue: COLOR BLEED: When color is applied to Compact Transit Van (truck_04), the entire canvas background becomes colored instead of staying black. The mix-blend-mode: multiply technique fails on this specific truck image.

issues: React warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (ColorWheel/PaintShop) - minor console warning

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix truck_04.png image - the current image causes color bleed when mix-blend-mode: multiply is applied
Option 1: Reprocess truck_04.png to ensure pure black (0,0,0) background with pure white (255,255,255) truck body
Option 2: Use a different truck_04 image that works with the multiply blend technique
Option 3: Apply a CSS mask or clip-path specifically for truck_04 to constrain the color overlay
Minor: Fix React setState warning in ColorWheel component
critical_code_review_comments: TruckCanvas implementation is correct - uses isolation context with mix-blend-mode: multiply
The issue is with the truck_04.png IMAGE, not the code logic
truck_04.png has 85% black pixels and 7% white pixels, but something in the image causes the multiply blend to fail
All other 5 truck images work correctly with the same code

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All features work except color bleed on truck_04

context_for_next_testing_agent: Color bleed bug confirmed ONLY on truck_04 (Compact Transit Van). All other 5 truck models work correctly. The issue is with the truck_04.png image file, not the TruckCanvas code. The image needs to be reprocessed or replaced.

Paint_Shop_Loads.details: Paint Shop loads correctly with all 6 truck model thumbnails

Truck_Images_Local.details: All 6 truck images load from /trucks/ directory

Color_Bleed_Test.details: truck_01, truck_02, truck_03, truck_05, truck_06 - PASS (background stays black). truck_04 - FAIL (entire background gets colored)

Color_Wheel_Hue_Ring.details: Circular hue ring works - clicking/dragging changes hue

Color_Wheel_SV_Square.details: SV square works - clicking/dragging changes saturation/brightness

Color_Wheel_HEX_Input.details: HEX input accepts valid hex values and updates preview

Color_Wheel_Live_Preview.details: Color preview updates as color changes

Preset_Palettes.details: All 6 palettes work: Classic Fleet, Copper & Steel, Street Food, Coastal, Luxury, Neon City

Palette_Swatches.details: Clicking palette color swatches applies color to truck immediately

Recent_Colors.details: Recent colors section shows previously selected colors

Finish_Types.details: All 7 finishes work: Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome, Enamel, Satin, Pearl

Two_Tone_Toggle.details: Two-tone toggle enables secondary color selection and split patterns

Text_Tab.details: Business name appears on truck preview with font/color/size options

Extras_Tab.details: Awning, LED Underglow, Roof Signage, Racing Stripe toggles all work

Truck_Model_Selection.details: Clicking truck model buttons changes the preview image

Save_Button.details: Save button saves design to backend, shows success toast

Reset_Button.details: Reset button clears design to defaults, shows 'Design reset to defaults' toast

Landing_Page.details: Hero image loads quickly with fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager'. Page load time ~319ms

comparison_with_truck_01.note: truck_01 has more white pixels and fewer mid-tones, works correctly

technical_analysis.hypothesis: truck_04 may have mid-tone pixels in areas that should be pure black, causing the multiply blend to produce visible color instead of black
